items.claim: Matteas Rebecki is on the decline.
items.quote: I do think that Rebeck is on the decline

items.claim: Matteas Rebecki is prone to getting cut up and bleeding heavily in fights.
items.quote: The thing is, he gets cut up very bad. ... And the guy just dropped so much so much blood, dude.

items.claim: Matteas Rebecki's scar tissue issues cannot be fixed.
